mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO agent_memory_job_state ( agent_id, session_id, processed_user_message_count, last_processed_message_id, last_processed_message_created_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid), CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid), #{processedUserMessageCount},
CAST(#{lastProcessedMessageId} AS uuid) NULL , #{lastProcessedMessageCreatedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON CONFLICT (agent_id, session_id) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, session_id, processed_user_message_count, last_processed_message_id, last_processed_message_created_at, created_at, updated_at FROM agent_memory_job_state WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid) AND processed_user_message_count <= #{processedUserMessageCount}
mapper.update:
UPDATE agent_memory_job_state SET processed_user_message_count = #{processedUserMessageCount}, last_processed_message_id =
CAST(#{lastProcessedMessageId} AS uuid) NULL , last_processed_message_created_at = #{lastProcessedMessageCreatedAt}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE agent_id = CAST(#{agentId} AS uuid) AND session_id = CAST(#{sessionId} AS uuid)
